allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix _nuxt 500 errors: fix Dockerfile COPY order, add .dockerignore, add nginx mime types

- Swap COPY order so clean npm ci node_modules overrides local ones
- Remove broken symlink workaround for static files
- Add .dockerignore to exclude node_modules, .nuxt, .output, .env from build context
- Add include mime.types to nginx config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
